item.title: Integrative genomic and metabolomic analyses identify novel associations between mQTLs and common diseases in Han Chinese.
item.description: Journal of biomedical research - While prior metabolomic genome-wide association studies (mGWASs) have identified numerous metabolite quantitative trait loci (mQTLs) in European populations, their characterization in East Asians-p...

item.title: The multifaceted regulation of autophagy protein ATG16L1 and its implications in human diseases.
item.description: Autophagy - Review - ATG16L1 (autophagy related 16 like 1) is a core macroautophagy/autophagy protein essential for autophagosome formation. It also functions in non-canonical autophagy pathways such as LC3-associated ...

item.title: The IL-10/IL-10Rα axis in fibroblasts limits large intestinal pathology by suppressing type I interferon signaling.
item.description: International immunology - Recent studies identified that the dysregulation of fibroblast activity, in addition to impairment in epithelial integrity and uncontrolled immune response, is implicated in the pathogenesis of inf...

item.title: SOCS1 Haploinsufficiency in a Patient with Granulomatous Interstitial Lung Disease and Inflammatory Bowel Disease-like Disease.
item.description: Clinical and experimental immunology - SOCS1 haploinsufficiency is an inborn error of immunity with dysregulated JAK-STAT signaling and heterogeneous autoimmune, infectious, and inflammatory phenotypes; its spectrum and management remai...
